description: Rindall is a boutique community of 44 thoughtfully designed 3- to 4-bedroom townhomes in the heart of Port Coquitlam. Perfect for families, Rindall offers the comfort of single-family living with convenient access to schools, recreation, and nearby trails. All homes include a private garage, with select homes featuring an additional driveway. Modern touches include 9' ceilings, a cooling system, and full-size kitchen appliances. Nearing completion, some homes are ready for immediate move-in. Measurements are approximate only. Buyers to verify if deemed important.
